visual_description: Three men are seated around a dark wooden table in a dimly lit room; one man in a white shirt and tie sits facing the camera, another in a blue shirt sits opposite, and a third man in a dark shirt is seated with his back to the camera. The man in the white shirt appears to be looking slightly upward and to his right, while the man in the blue shirt looks down at his hands. On the table are two briefcases, one open revealing stacks of cash, and a notepad with a pen.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable background noise or inflection.
